Petition For Approval Of Settlement
Off Calendar Dec-19-2011 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Sep-26-2011 Continued To Dec-19-11 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michelle Trausch for Beneficiaries under the will. Tim Beresky appeared by telephone for David Howard and Linda Bay.

The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than November 28, 2011. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by December 5, 2011. The Petition for Letters of Administration With Will Annexed was continued to and the Parties are to return on December 19, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Contreras.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Aug-08-2011 Continued To Sep-26-11 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Jul-25-2011 Continued To Aug-08-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Letters Of Special Administration
Off Calendar Jul-06-2011 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Jun-27-2011 Continued To Jul-25-11 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michelle Trausch for William Estrada (Beneficiary). Timothy Bereski appeared by telephone for David Howard and for Linda Day. Lawrence Sriacusa for and with Barbara DeVries.

Mr. Siracusa stated that they stipulated to his Client being appointed as the Special Adminisrtator, that Mr. Bereski requested copies of his file of the confidential documents for the first year of the Conersvatorship, that Ms. Trausch has agreed to the release of the documents and that he will file an ex parte petition for the above. Ms. Truasch stated that they have not had discussions as to how to proceed with the will contest. The matter was continued to July 25, 2011 at 10:30 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Mr. Bereski to have the opportunity to review the confidential court file. Mr. Bereski will appear by court call. The Parties are to inform the Court as to what there intent is with regard to the will contest.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Jun-06-2011 Continued To Jun-27-11 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Tim Beresky appeared by telephone for David Howard. Avid Alavi for Barbara DeVries (Petitioner).

Mr. Beresky requested a 30-day continuance stating that he intends to oppose the petition, that his Client believes that the Decedent was mentally incompetent when she signed the will, that he would like to talk to the Attorney who prepared the will before filing the will contest and that many Nephews and Nieces are considering contesting the will. Ms. Alavi stated that she had no objection to a continuance, requested two weeks rather than 30-days and provided back ground case history. The Petition for Letters of Administration was continued to June 27, 2011 at 10:30 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
